title: Chapter 32
content:
Chapter 32: 32 | The Taste Of Vanilla And The Sound Of A Level Up

\[You drink a mouthful of milk from a Silver-tier target. As a result, you get 50 points!\]

"It feels so good," she whimpered. "I can’t... I can’t think straight."

\[You drink a mouthful of milk from a Silver-tier target. As a result, you get 50 points!\]

Her milk tasted like vanilla and something uniquely her. Something innocent and pure that probably should have made me feel guilty. It didn’t.

\[You drink a mouthful of milk from a Silver-tier target. As a result, you get 50 points!\]

"Oh! That’s—ahh!"

\[You drink a mouthful of milk from a Silver-tier target. As a result, you get 50 points!\]

I lifted my head, watching milk continue to leak from her nipple. The sight was fucking surreal. This gorgeous girl was literally producing magic milk that would keep me alive, and she was loving every second of it.

"Why did you stop?" she panted, pink eyes unfocused.

"Just looking at you," I said truthfully. "You’re fucking beautiful."

Fuck, I was hard enough to drill through concrete.

\[You drink a mouthful of milk from a Silver-tier target. As a result, you get 50 points!\]

I added a second finger, curling them forward to find that spot that would make her—

"Jace! Right there! Don’t stop!"

Found it.

I sucked harder at her breast, milk practically gushing now. It spilled from the corners of my mouth, ran down her breast, pooled on the bed beneath us. I couldn’t swallow fast enough.

\[You drink a mouthful of milk from a Silver-tier target. As a result, you get 50 points!\]

I worked my fingers faster, maintaining pressure on that perfect spot inside her while my thumb circled her clit. Her thighs trembled on either side of my hand. She was close.

Her back arched impossibly high, lifting half off the bed. Her walls clamped down on my fingers with surprising strength. And her breast—fuck—her breast released a jet of milk so forceful it hit the back of my throat.

\[You drink a mouthful of milk from a Silver-tier target. As a result, you get 50 points!\]

◆ FIRST SESSION COMPLETE ◆

Target: Naomi Love - Silver Rank

Total Consumed: 8 mouthfuls (1 cup)

Status Effects:

Naomi Love

Measurements: 36D-27-38

Rank: Silver

Jesus Christ. It had jumped almost thirty percentage points in one session. The devotion increase to 60% made sense now.

"Yes," she said, reaching up to touch my face. "I want to help you."
